# The Idaho Signal

> Tracking Idaho’s technology economy: companies, AI, infrastructure, semiconductors, energy, agriculture, broadband, repair, and practical B2B technology across Idaho.

## Key pages

- [Home](/): Publication homepage and launch stories.
- [Companies](/companies.html): Future Idaho technology company directory.
- [Submit a Signal](/submit.html): Tip and company submission path.

## Launch articles

- [Why Idaho Matters More to American Technology Than Most People Think](/articles/why-idaho-matters-to-american-technology.html): Idaho is not trying to be Silicon Valley. Its technology story is more physical: chips, reactors, farms, broadband, repair, and the small businesses where new tools either work or fail.
- [What AI Actually Means for Idaho Small Businesses](/articles/what-ai-actually-means-for-idaho-small-businesses.html): The useful version of AI for Idaho is not magic. It is missed-call follow-up, cleaner intake, faster estimates, better staff handoffs, and human-approved systems that reduce admin drag.
- [Micron, Memory, and Idaho’s Place in the Chip Supply Chain](/articles/micron-memory-and-idahos-place-in-the-chip-supply-chain.html): Micron is more than a familiar Boise headquarters name. Memory chips put Idaho inside one of the most important industrial shifts in the country.
